sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72450" key="oi)nanqa/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνανθ-άριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> sq., <sense id="n72450.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a compound ointment,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:7:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
